## [Special Bee Request]: Flower Tier Access for Pollinations Tools Hub

[![Built with Pollinations](https://img.shields.io/badge/Built%20with-Pollinations-8a2be2?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/png;base64,&logoColor=white&labelColor=6a0dad)](https://pollinations.ai)

### Project Name
**Pollinations Tools** — A free AI tools hub built entirely on Pollinations.ai

### Live URL
🌐 [lokiodinson.netlify.app/ai](https://lokiodinson.netlify.app/ai)

### GitHub Repository
📦 [github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/pollinations-tools](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/pollinations-tools)

---

### Project Description

Pollinations Tools is a free, open-source collection of browser-based AI tools powered entirely by the Pollinations.ai API. The project is deployed on Netlify and requires no sign-up, no installation, and no technical knowledge from users — just open and use.

The hub currently includes three fully functional tools:

| Tool | Model | URL |
|------|-------|-----|
| 📄 Document Translator | gemini-2.5-flash-lite | /ai/translator |
| 🎙️ Voice Studio | tts-1 (OpenAI + ElevenLabs) | /ai/text2audio |
| 🌄 Image Studio | zimage + gemini-2.5-flash-lite | /ai/text2image |

Each tool is a single self-contained HTML file — no build step, no dependencies. Visitors can use all tools instantly with the baked-in publishable key, or enter their own key for personal rate limits.

---

### Current Tier
🌱 **Seed** (confirmed)

### Requested Tier
🌸 **Flower**

---

### Why I Need Flower Tier

1. **Growing user base** — The tools page is live and being shared. Real users are generating translations, audio, and images daily through the shared publishable key, which means all their usage counts against my single key's quota.

2. **Shared key architecture** — Because the tools are frontend-only (no backend server), every visitor's request uses my publishable key. Even modest traffic hits Seed tier limits quickly. Flower tier's higher rate limits would let me serve real users without interruptions.

3. **Promotion of Pollinations** — Every tool prominently displays "Powered by Pollinations.ai" with a direct link to pollinations.ai. The hub includes a dedicated promo section explaining what Pollinations is, its free tier, open-source nature, and 40+ models. New users discovering these tools learn about Pollinations directly.

4. **Open source** — The full source is public on GitHub with an MIT license, so other developers can fork it and build their own Pollinations-powered tool hubs.

5. **Expanding the catalog** — I'm actively building more tools. With Flower tier access I can add tools using advanced models (gptimage, seedream) that aren't available on Seed tier.

---

### Use Case Description

The target users are everyday people who want to use AI without signing up for ChatGPT, Midjourney, or ElevenLabs. Students translating documents, writers converting their text to audio, creators generating images — all for free, with no account required.

Every single request they make goes through Pollinations.ai, making this a direct driver of API usage volume for the platform.

---

### Pollinations Integration Details

- **API used:** `gen.pollinations.ai/v1/chat/completions`, `gen.pollinations.ai/v1/audio/speech`, `gen.pollinations.ai/image/`
- **Auth method:** Publishable key (`pk_`) via `Authorization: Bearer` header
- **Models used:** `gemini-2.5-flash-lite`, `tts-1`, `zimage`
- **Attribution:** "Powered by Pollinations.ai" displayed on every page + dedicated promo section on the hub

---

### Screenshots / Demo

- Hub: [lokiodinson.netlify.app/ai](https://lokiodinson.netlify.app/ai)
- Translator: [lokiodinson.netlify.app/ai/translator](https://lokiodinson.netlify.app/ai/translator)
- Voice Studio: [lokiodinson.netlify.app/ai/text2audio](https://lokiodinson.netlify.app/ai/text2audio)
- Image Studio: [lokiodinson.netlify.app/ai/text2image](https://lokiodinson.netlify.app/ai/text2image)

---

Thank you for building such an incredible open platform. Pollinations is genuinely the most accessible AI API I've worked with — no other platform lets you ship real AI tools to real users this quickly and freely. I'm committed to keeping all tools free, open-source, and Pollinations-attributed. 🌸
